hero.headline: Transform Your Ideas Into Powerful Web Solutions
hero.subheadline: Full-stack web developer specializing in modern, scalable applications for startups and businesses

about.title: About Me
about.description: Hi, I'm Josue Covarrubias, a web developer based in Bolivia with a passion for creating efficient, modern web solutions. As a final-semester Systems Engineering student with 1 year of professional remote development experience for an Argentine company, I bring both academic knowledge and real-world expertise to every project.
about.description_2: I specialize in the React/Next.js ecosystem and build everything from sleek landing pages to complex dashboards and APIs. Whether you're a startup looking to launch your MVP or an established business needing to modernize your digital presence, I deliver clean, maintainable code that scales with your needs.
